name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE CLEARANCE: Unique Veterinary Prescription Diet Adult Dog Joint Bone Support Salmon & Anchovy 12kg
description: How it works: Reducing joint inflammation with EPA and DHA, Joint protection with glucosamine and chondroitin sulfate content, Special and rich content for joint health (flaxseed, collagen, whitewash herb, MSM), Accelerating the joint healing process with MSM (methyl sulfonyl methane) , Sea buckthorn (Omega-7 and anti-inflammatory), Borage oil (supports the immune system and joints), Rich fibre content (healthy digestion), Strong immunity with probiotic and prebiotic content. Ingredients Anchovy Protein, Brown Rice, Pea, Hydrolyzed Salmon Protein, Sugar Beet Pulp, Corn Gluten Meal, Chicken Oil, Flaxseed, Salmon Oil, Hydrolyzed Chicken Liver, Collagen (hydrolyzed), Vitamin and Mineral Premix, Natural Flavors, Probiotic, Dried Algae, Borage Oil, MOS, ?-Glucan, Tocopherol, Methyl Sulfonyl Methane, Akg?nl?k, Yucca, Eggshell Membrane.
